open_science_requirements: Communicable results must be shared with the European R&D community through the AI-on-demand platform. (CC-04; source_section: call_entry.scope; source_document: HORIZON-CL4-2026-05-DIGITAL-EMERGING-02.slice.json)

Open access obligations for scientific publications and research data apply under standard Horizon Europe RIA grant conditions. (EC-07; source_section: call_entry.eligibility_conditions; source_document: HORIZON-CL4-2026-05-DIGITAL-EMERGING-02.slice.json; status: Assumed — not explicitly stated in topic-level source; verify against Tier 1 normative sources)

Communicable results must be shared via the AI-on-demand platform; projects must link to AI Factories and Data Labs resources; results may be validated in Testing and Experiment Facilities and deployed via EDIHs. (SR-06; source_section: call_entry.scope; source_document: HORIZON-CL4-2026-05-DIGITAL-EMERGING-02.slice.json)
